page: Microsoft Azure DC2eds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCEDV6 family. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of 4.0 GB per core.

This server configuration includes 118 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There is no integrated GPU hardware on this instance.

Positioned within the memory-optimized category of the DCEDV6 family, the DC2eds_v6 provides a balanced resource density for entry-level workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution and local disk space. The inclusion of 118 GB of local storage alongside 8.0 GB of RAM makes it suitable for small-scale database hosting, lightweight caching layers, and basic enterprise applications that benefit from isolated virtualized environments without requiring high-density compute or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC2eds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEDV6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 2 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For storage, the instance includes 118 GB of local disk capacity and supports Premium Storage options. It features no GPU hardware and does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed as an entry-level memory-optimized resource, this instance is structured for workloads that require dedicated processing cores and moderate memory allocations. Suitable applications include small-scale databases, lightweight caching systems, and basic enterprise services that require local storage capabilities without the overhead of larger, high-density compute configurations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC2eds_v6 is a dedicated 2-vCPU Intel server with 8.0 GB of RAM and 118 GB of local storage, designed for entry-level database and memory-optimized enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated two-core Intel instance featuring eight gigabytes of memory and local storage for entry-level database and caching workloads.
